---
title: "Contact Us"
description: "Get in touch with chen.ist. Book a consultation, send us an email, or visit our offices in Craiova and Bucharest, Romania."
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Ensure raw HTML is properly rendered */
        form {
          display: block;
          width: 100%;
        }
        input, textarea, .form-control {
          display: block;
          width: 100%;
          padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem;
          font-size: 1rem;
          font-weight: 400;
          line-height: 1.5;
          color: var(--bs-body-color);
          background-color: var(--bs-form-control-bg);
          background-clip: padding-box;
          border: var(--bs-border-width) solid var(--bs-border-color);
          appearance: none;
          border-radius: 0.375rem;
          transition: border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out;
        }
        .form-label {
          margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="/">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Contact</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Get in Touch

We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our services, need a quote, or want to discuss a potential project, our team is ready to assist you.

### Contact Information

::: {.row .mt-4}
::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-envelope text-green me-2"></i> Email

For general inquiries: [office@chen.ist](mailto:office@chen.ist)

For support: [support@chen.ist](mailto:support@chen.ist)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-calendar-check text-green me-2"></i> Book a Meeting

Schedule a consultation directly:

[Book a Call](https://cal.com/chenist){.btn .btn-success target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

### Office Locations

::: {.row .mt-4}
::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-geo-alt text-green me-2"></i> Headquarters

Str. Filantropiei, 1-3, 200143
Craiova, Romania
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-geo-alt text-green me-2"></i> Partners Office

Bucharest, Romania

For support: [bucharest@chen.ist](mailto:bucharest@chen.ist)


:::
:::
:::
:::

## Contact Us / Book a Meeting

```{=html}
<div class="mt-4 mb-5">
  <ul class="nav nav-tabs" id="contactTabs" role="tablist">
    <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
      <button class="nav-link active" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#formContact" type="button" role="tab">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-2"></i>Send a Message (Romania)
      </button>
    </li>
    <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
      <button class="nav-link" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#calContact" type="button" role="tab">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i>Book a Call (EU / International)
      </button>
    </li>
  </ul>
  <div class="tab-content">
    <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="formContact" role="tabpanel">
      <div class="p-4 border border-top-0 rounded-bottom">
        <p class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Fill out the form and we.ll get back to you within 24 hours. Complete the form and we'll respond within 24 hours.</p>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="row mb-3">
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label">Full Name *</label>
              <input type="text" class="form-control" name="name" required placeholder="Your full name">
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label">Email *</label>
              <input type="email" class="form-control" name="email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="row mb-3">
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label">Phone</label>
              <input type="tel" class="form-control" name="phone" placeholder="Phone number">
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label">Company</label>
              <input type="text" class="form-control" name="company" placeholder="Company (optional)">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Interest *</label>
            <select class="form-select" name="interest" required>
              <option value="">Select...</option>
              <optgroup label="Services">
                <option value="digital-infrastructure">Digital Infrastructure</option>
                <option value="cybersecurity">Cybersecurity</option>
                <option value="nis2">NIS2 Compliance</option>
                <option value="cloud">Cloud Services</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Academy">
                <option value="course">Course Enrollment</option>
                <option value="training">Training Registration</option>
                <option value="event">Event / Hackathon</option>
                <option value="webinar">Webinar</option>
                <option value="summer-school">Summer School</option>
              </optgroup>
              <option value="general">General Inquiry</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Message *</label>
            <textarea class="form-control" name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="How can we help you?"></textarea>
          </div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New Contact from chen.ist">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="contact-page">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="mb-3 form-check">
            <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" required>
            <label class="form-check-label">I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</label>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg w-100"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Send Message</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tab-pane fade" id="calContact" role="tabpanel">
      <div class="p-4 border border-top-0 rounded-bottom">
        <p class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-globe me-1"></i>Prefer a live conversation? Book directly in our calendar. Book directly in our calendar.</p>
        <div id="cal-inline-embed" style="width:100%;min-height:500px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var calLoaded = false;
  var calTab = document.querySelector('[data-bs-target="#calContact"]');
  if (calTab) {
    calTab.addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', function() {
      if (!calLoaded && typeof Cal !== 'undefined') {
        Cal("inline", {elementOrSelector: "#cal-inline-embed", calLink: "chenist", layout: "month_view"});
        calLoaded = true;
      }
    });
  }
});
</script>
```

## Connect With Us

::: {.row .mt-5}
::: {.col-md-12 .text-center}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin me-1"></i> LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/chenist){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2 .mb-2}
[<i class="bi bi-github me-1"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/chenist){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2 .mb-2}
[<i class="bi bi-twitter me-1"></i> Twitter](https://twitter.com/chenist){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2 .mb-2}
:::
:::
